query:
CREATE TABLE `cart_items` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`itemData` text NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `cart_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`itemData` text NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `cart_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
